{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Torchyard
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Surviving the [[Torchyard]] allows one to harvest enough [[vital aura]] to fuel advancement even to the [[Gold stage]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
